pr.title: [Non-Record Submission] CompressedUT CE + EMA Export + Export-Aligned Late QAT (1.4457 BPB)

output.summary: CompressedUT CE run boosts artifact by strengthening the compressed latent backbone combined with EMA export and export-aligned late QAT with wider capacity.
techniques: Compressed latent transformer over byte convolutional frontend
EMA-weight export with late QAT aligned to the deployment quantizer
Expanded int6 clip search plus wider byte pathway to use remaining budget
